summary: Emits a saved message payload when clicked or triggered.
description: Message is a Max/Pd-like message box. Click or bang emits the stored message; set <message> replaces the runtime message silently.
runtimeBehavior: Click or bang on in emits the saved message payload. set ... on in updates runtime message text without output. Inspector edits are saved graph mutations.

ports.description: Hot message inlet: bang emits saved payload; set ... updates silently; other messages evaluate the stored payload.
Outputs the saved key plus typed atoms as a message payload.

params.description: Saved message box text parsed into key plus atoms at runtime.
Optional message channel name updated whenever the message emits.
Optional message channel name used to receive routed message updates.

example.title: Trigger a string message
example.description: Use Bang to emit the saved message text on demand.
